case_title: ANDREW GUILLORY VS. STATE FARM AUTO INSURANCE COMPANY

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF GUILLORY, ANDREW AS TO DEFENDANT STATE FARM AUTO INSURANCE COMPANY

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-23-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-23-2008 BY JUDGE PRO TEM SASHA CUMMINGS. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. EXHIBITS FROM BOTH SIDES RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT STATE FARM AUTO INSURANCE COMPANY
CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED UNCLAIMED. SENT TO DEFT.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-11-2008 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO MAY-23-2008 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF PRESENT. DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF ADVISED THAT DEFENDANT NEEDS TO BE SERVED. CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED FROM THE POST OFFICE AS: NO SUCH STREET. JUDGE PRO TEM: EDWARD HOLTZ. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT STATE FARM AUTO INSURANCE COMPANY
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM SASHA CUMMINIGS FILED BY GUILLORY, ANDREW STATE FARM AUTO INSURANCE COMPANY
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-23-2008 - JUDGMENT. (CLERK-BETH WILBER)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GUILLORY, ANDREW RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT STATE FARM AUTO INSURANCE COMPANY $845.13 PRINCIPAL, $70.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $915.13, (THE COURT FINDS THAT THE ESTIMATE OF REPAIR IN THE AMOUNT OF $1345.13 IS REASONABLE, LESS PLAINTIFF'S DEDUCTIBLE OF $500.00. TO THE EXTENT DEFENDANT'S PRIOR DRAFT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF FOR $845.13 IS STILL VALID, IT IS SUFFICIENT TO SATISFY THIS JUDGMENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
